design_description: Task is bound to the three newest inbox messages by descending timestamp. The inbox messages use real Oct 1, 2026 epoch-ms timestamps and are applied in reverse visible order so Mail's prepended seed list displays Nora newest, Liam next-newest, and Mia oldest among those three. The source file is a realistic approval notes attachment, and evaluation checks all three exact replies plus the attachment on the oldest of the three replies.
